header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-950/70 border-b border-slate-800/50 transition-all

hero.layout: min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center pt-24 relative overflow-hidden
hero.h1_classes: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-black tracking-tighter text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-br from-white via-slate-200 to-slate-500 mb-8
hero.subtitle_classes: text-lg md:text-2xl text-slate-400 mb-12 max-w-3xl mx-auto font-light leading-relaxed
hero.primary_btn: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(59,130,246,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_32px_rgba(59,130,246,0.6)]
hero.secondary_btn: bg-transparent border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-800/50 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium transition-all

bento_cards.base: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-3xl p-8 hover:border-blue-500/30 transition-all duration-500 relative overflow-hidden group

animations.scroll: framer-motion staggered whileInView with opacity and y-axis translation
animations.micro_interactions: scale-up on hover, animated border tracing on premium feature cards
animations.parallax: subtle y-axis background image movement on scroll

hero_background.description: Abstract glowing blue orb. Use as an absolute positioned, low opacity (e.g. 20%), blurred background image behind the hero text to create a deep, premium atmospheric glow.

project_btk.placement: Project Showcase - BTK Site Sorgu Botu

features.telegram_button: Floating bottom-right, distinct blue/cyan gradient, with pulse animation. Link to https://t.me/egecz
features.dark_mode_toggle: Include in header, default should be dark mode.

sections: 1. HERO SECTION - Big bold headline, 2 CTA buttons
2. PROBLEM/SOLUTION - Split layout, left problems, right solutions
3. SERVICES - 4 bento cards (AI Agent, Workflow, Scraping, Web/Mobile)
4. PROJECT SHOWCASE - 3 projects (BTK, Axiemaps, Whoiser) using provided images
9. PRICING - 3 tiers (Starter, Growth, Full Automation) with tracing border on middle tier
10. FINAL CTA - High impact, footer area

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly write all UI copy in Turkish.

Implement the landing page primarily using custom Tailwind CSS HTML elements (div, section) for highly creative layouts like Bento Grids and asymmetrical hero sections. Avoid Shadcn Cards if they restrict layout.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React for modern, crisp tech icons.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms for automated testing.
Include google fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in your HTML/CSS.
Value proposition 'Manuel işleri ortadan kaldıran sistemler kuruyorum' (I build systems that replace manual work) must be prominent.
Ensure dark + blue tones are rigorously applied, creating a 'Premium Tech/SaaS' aesthetic.
Make the floating Telegram button extremely obvious with a pulsing animation.
Install and integrate Framer Motion for scroll reveals.
